datasets.name: Price Per Sqm Postcode District
datasets.description: Inflation-adjusted price per m² by postcode district (England & Wales, Jan 1995–present). Derived from HM Land Registry Price Paid Data joined to EPC floor areas.

schema.name: num_sales
schema.description: Number of residential sales matched to an EPC record

schema.name: total_floor_area
schema.description: Total floor area of matched properties (m²)

schema.name: total_price
schema.description: Total transaction value of matched sales (£)

schema.name: price_per_sqm
schema.description: Nominal price per m² = total_price / total_floor_area (£). Not a mean of per-property ratios.

schema.name: adj_price_per_sqm
schema.description: CPI-adjusted price per m², base January 2026 (£). Deflated using ONS CPI series D7BT.

datasets.name: Price Per Sqm Lsoa
datasets.description: Inflation-adjusted price per m² by 2021 LSOA (England & Wales, Jan 1995–present). Derived from HM Land Registry Price Paid Data joined to EPC floor areas.

schema.name: LSOA21CD
schema.description: ONS 2021 Lower Super Output Area code (e.g. E01000001)

schema.name: num_sales
schema.description: Number of residential sales matched to an EPC record

schema.name: total_floor_area
schema.description: Total floor area of matched properties (m²)

schema.name: total_price
schema.description: Total transaction value of matched sales (£)

schema.name: price_per_sqm
schema.description: Nominal price per m² = total_price / total_floor_area (£). Not a mean of per-property ratios.

schema.name: adj_price_per_sqm
schema.description: CPI-adjusted price per m², base January 2026 (£). Deflated using ONS CPI series D7BT.
